name: Enchantment
summary: The enchanter uses magic to control and manipulate the minds of his victims.

granted_power_l1_passive.name: Enchanting Smile
granted_power_l1_passive.summary: You gain a +2 enhancement bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, and Intimidate skill checks. This bonus increases by +1 for every five wizard levels you possess, up to a maximum of +6 at 20th level.

granted_power_l1_active.name: Dazing Touch
granted_power_l1_active.summary: You can cause a living creature to become dazed for 1 round as a melee touch attack. Creatures with more Hit Dice than your wizard level are unaffected. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier.

higher_level_powers.summary: 30 ft aura, foes -2 morale on attacks/saves/ability/skill checks.
